hypothesis: 建立结构化实验日志格式后，后续迭代可以避免重复失败尝试并保留参数记忆。
change_summary: 新增实验日志文件与字段规范，作为未来所有 accepted/rejected 尝试的统一落点。
notes: 这是台账初始化记录，不是策略实验结果。后续每次策略尝试都应按本格式追加一行。

hypothesis: Trailing stops (high_water - N*ATR after profit trigger) outperform the 3.5x ATR fixed target across BULL/NEUTRAL/BEAR windows.
change_summary: Backtester Position class gained trailing-stop infrastructure (TRAIL_TRIGGER_ATR_MULT, TRAIL_OFFSET_ATR_MULT); kept off by default because 3 swept configs were strictly worse than baseline in every window.

delta_metrics.note: All 3 configs strictly worse than baseline in every window; see after_metrics.by_window_pnl_sharpe for cell-by-cell deltas.

rejection_reason: No config outperformed baseline in all 3 non-overlapping windows. trail 3.0/2.0 beat baseline on Oct25-Apr26 PnL but lost on Sharpe, and was strictly worse on Apr25-Oct25 and Oct24-Apr25 — violates AGENTS.md Gate 4 multi-window stability requirement.
next_retry_requires: Different parameter space (e.g. percent-based trails instead of ATR multiples)
Evidence that 3.5x ATR fixed target is wrong for the current regime mix
New window data in BEAR-heavy regime where trails may behave differently
notes: Infrastructure left in codebase with default-off constants for future sweeps.

hypothesis: A regime-gated passive SPY overlay (deploy idle cash into SPY when SPY 10-day momentum > threshold) captures market beta during ripping BULL windows without changing active signal decisions.
change_summary: Planned allocation-layer change. Rejected in planning without executing; the motivation was single-window (Apr25-Oct25 secondary) and AGENTS.md §6.1 blocks strategy tweaks while LLM gate is un-replayed.
component: quant/backtester.py (overlay state machine between exit-check and signal-entry, not executed)

market_regime_summary.secondary: BULL (ripping, +10% strategy vs +30% SPY — source of motivation)

delta_metrics.note: Never executed — rejected in planning per AGENTS.md §6.1.

rejection_reason: AGENTS.md §6.1 blocks strategy tweaks while LLM decisions are un-replayed and un-attributed (llm_gate_unreplayed=True in known_biases). AGENTS.md §2.1 flags single-window motivation as over-fitting. AGENTS.md §1.2 requires checking history before new iterations — this was the first plan written against AGENTS.md and it failed those gates.
next_retry_requires: LLM replay coverage >= 30 days so strategy-layer measurement is not confounded
At least one BEAR window in the acceptance gate (current 3 windows are all BULL variants)
Regime label (not just 10d momentum) to avoid deploying into dead-cat bounces
An intraday emergency-exit mechanism (10d momentum is lagging; sharp reversals eat drawdown)
notes: Rejected-before-execution record kept per AGENTS.md §6.2 so future agents do not rediscover and re-propose the same thing.

hypothesis: Wiring the backtester to replay LLM decisions from data/llm_prompt_resp_YYYYMMDD.json when present (default off) closes the §6.1 production-vs-backtest parity gap without degrading off-mode metrics, and produces the first §4.2-compliant LLM attribution bucket.
change_summary: New quant/llm_replay.py module; BacktestEngine gained --replay-llm flag; known_biases.llm_gate_unreplayed restructured from bool to dict{enabled,coverage_fraction,dates_covered,dates_missing_n}; result['llm_attribution'] added.

llm_metrics.llm_attribution_metric: llm_attribution bucket (coverage_fraction, signals_presented, signals_vetoed_by_llm, signals_passed_by_llm, veto_rate)
llm_metrics.note: Sample too small (5 response files over 124 trading days) for real alpha attribution; logging the mechanism is the deliverable, not the alpha claim.

notes: Off-mode numerics identical to baseline (code path is pure passthrough when replay_llm=False). On-mode attribution is statistically immaterial at n=5 covered days — value is the mechanism, not the current delta.

hypothesis: Turning known_biases.news_veto_unreplayed from a bare bool(True) into a structured coverage bucket (parallel to llm_gate_unreplayed's exp-004 upgrade) makes the news-archive parity gap auditable per-run without touching decision logic. Numerical strategy metrics MUST be identical to baseline by construction because no signal/entry/exit/sizing code path was modified.
change_summary: BacktestEngine.run() now per-day checks whether data/clean_trade_news_YYYYMMDD.json exists and surfaces the coverage as known_biases.news_veto_unreplayed = {archive_replay_enabled:False, archive_coverage_fraction, archive_dates_covered, archive_dates_missing_n}. test_backtester_emits_known_biases_and_integrity updated to match new schema.

known_biases.notes[0].old: news veto lives in filter.py (EVENT_KEYWORDS + T1_TITLE_KEYWORDS); no historical archive
known_biases.notes[0].new: news veto lives in filter.py (EVENT_KEYWORDS + T1_TITLE_KEYWORDS); clean_trade_news_YYYYMMDD.json archive coverage is reported but no replay engine exists yet

market_regime_summary.primary: BULL (slow-melt; same window as baseline exp-004)

after_metrics.note: Minor drift from market data refresh — 2026-04-17 OHLCV finalized after baseline was recorded. Structural metrics (trade_count=30, win_rate=60%, drawdown=4.59%) are identical; PnL/sharpe differ <2% due to end-of-day price data finalization.

delta_metrics.note: All delta attributable to yfinance price refresh for 2026-04-17 (last day of window), not code change. No signal/entry/exit/sizing path was modified. confirmed by: test_backtester_emits_known_biases_and_integrity PASSED; known_biases.news_veto_unreplayed is dict with archive_coverage_fraction=0.1048 (13/124 days).

llm_metrics.note: Measurement change only — no LLM prompt or boundary touched. Unlocks a future §4.2 attribution experiment where signals can be regressed against T1 news presence using the now-exposed archive_dates_covered list.

notes: Validated 2026-04-18. pytest PASSED (test_backtester_emits_known_biases_and_integrity). Actual archive_coverage_fraction=0.1048 (13/124 trading days) — matches the predicted ~10%. 13 covered dates span 2026-01-23 to 2026-04-17. archive_dates_missing_n=111. Follow-up: exp-20260418-002 built news_replay.py module on top of this bucket.

hypothesis: Building news_replay.py (parallel to llm_replay.py) to apply T1-negative news veto in backtester --replay-news mode closes the §6.1 news-veto parity gap for covered dates. Off-mode metrics must be identical to baseline; on-mode measures the actual veto impact.
change_summary: New quant/news_replay.py module with _T1_NEGATIVE_KEYWORDS classifier, get_news_for_date(), apply_news_gate(). BacktestEngine gained replay_news parameter and --replay-news CLI flag. news_attribution bucket added to result (parallel to llm_attribution). known_biases.news_veto_unreplayed.archive_replay_enabled now reflects replay_news state.

delta_metrics.note: Off-mode: bit-identical to before_metrics (pure passthrough). On-mode: zero vetoes across 6 signals on 13 covered days → news_veto bias is NEGLIGIBLE for this window. The optimistic bias from un-replayed news veto is smaller than feared: quant signals and T1-negative news are anti-correlated (bullish quant signal rarely coincides with bearish T1 news).

notes: Key insight: 0 vetoes out of 6 signals on 13 covered days. This is expected — if a ticker has T1-negative news (earnings miss, guidance cut), the quant signal engine would likely NOT generate a bullish trend/breakout signal for it on that day (stock would be down, trend broken). The two filters are anti-correlated. This means the 'news veto bias' label overstates the actual gap — the bias exists in theory but may be near-zero in practice for pure quant signals. In 217 pytest tests pass. Establish true baseline EV score: 0.4875 (updated from 0.4954, which was stale from before market data refresh).

hypothesis: import_advice.py currently saves only investment_advice_YYYYMMDD.json (for forward_tester) but NOT llm_prompt_resp_YYYYMMDD.json (needed by backtester --replay-llm). The user must manually create the replay files. Fixing import_advice to also write the replay file will close this workflow gap and make each LLM import automatically contribute to the 30-day replay coverage target (P-LLM).
change_summary: import_advice.import_advice() now also writes llm_prompt_resp_YYYYMMDD.json alongside investment_advice_YYYYMMDD.json. Guard added: skips if file already exists (preserves manual files) or if response is a fake save-prompt acknowledgment. llm_replay.py docstring corrected. 3 new tests added.

import_advice.import_advice.new: also writes llm_prompt_resp_YYYYMMDD.json when real LLM response detected

delta_metrics.note: No change to backtest metrics — this is pure infrastructure plumbing. Each future import_advice run will now automatically contribute 1 day to the 30-day P-LLM coverage target without requiring a separate manual step. Key finding during investigation: Feb 14-20 investment_advice files were fake (save-prompt acknowledgments, not real LLM responses) — backfilling them as replay files would have incorrectly vetoed all signals on those dates. Guard prevents this class of error.

notes: Also fixed: llm_replay.py docstring previously claimed files were written by import_advice.py (false until this change). 223/223 tests pass. P-LLM progress: 5 trading days covered (Apr 13-17), 25 more needed for 30-day threshold.

hypothesis: lxml was not installed, causing yfinance get_earnings_dates() to silently fail for all tickers in the backtester. Installing lxml enables the earnings calendar and allows earnings_event_long to fire. This is the root cause of earnings_event_long showing 0 trades in prior backtests.
change_summary: Installed lxml==6.1.0 (missing dependency). Added known_biases.earnings_event_long_data_quality disclosure to backtester output. New finding: earnings_event_long fires 12 trades at 33% win rate (profit_factor=0.33) when positive_surprise_history=None. Also displaces A+B trades (MAX_POSITIONS cap): trend_long 13->11, breakout_long 17->15.

delta_metrics.note: EV degraded 46.8%. Gate 4 fails on strategy metrics. Carve-out applies: this is a data gap fix, not strategy change. Key findings: (1) C strategy at 33% win rate with partial data is genuinely bad; (2) C displaces A+B slots (A went 13->11, B went 17->15); (3) Combined effect explains most of EV decline. P-ERN is now highest priority to determine if C strategy improves with full data.

next_retry_requires: Accumulate daily earnings snapshots (P-ERN) for >=10 days to test if positive_surprise_history improves C strategy win rate above 50%
Re-evaluate earnings_event_long with full data before concluding strategy is viable
notes: A+B strategies alone: EV=0.4875 (excellent, 60% WR, PF>3). C strategy alone: EV contribution negative (33% WR, PF=0.33). New baseline including C: EV=0.2595. The displacement effect (C taking A+B slots) is a second-order negative. AGENTS.md baseline should be updated to EV=0.2595. 223/223 tests pass.

hypothesis: The repository already has earnings snapshot replay support in the backtester, but only quant/run.py persisted daily snapshots. Wiring the same structured snapshot write into every production entry point that fetches earnings data closes the P-ERN data accumulation gap without changing strategy logic.
change_summary: Added quant/earnings_snapshot.py as a single helper for structured daily earnings snapshot persistence, then wired it into quant/run.py, quant/run_quant.py, and quant/run_pipeline.py immediately after earnings data fetch. Added 2 tests covering schema filtering and idempotent same-day writes.

snapshot_writer.new: shared persist_earnings_snapshot() helper used by all 3 entry points

write_behavior.new: all entry points skip existing same-day file via shared helper

after_metrics.note: Backtester rerun on the baseline window remained effectively unchanged. Max drawdown drifted from 4.59% to 4.61%, within normal market data refresh noise.

delta_metrics.note: Gate 4 alpha thresholds are intentionally not the acceptance criterion here because this is a measurement/data-gap repair. The deliverable is future snapshot coverage, not immediate metric uplift on already-missing historical days.

next_retry_requires: Allow the production pipelines to run for multiple days so earnings snapshots accumulate in data/earnings_snapshot_YYYYMMDD.json
After snapshot coverage improves, re-evaluate earnings_event_long quality and slot displacement with historical replay
notes: This iteration changed one causal variable only: daily earnings snapshot persistence coverage. It does not widen LLM scope, add filters, or retune thresholds. Verification: targeted pytest run passed (7 tests), and the baseline-window backtester rerun reproduced EV=0.2595.

hypothesis: LLM 是否有选择地否决 C 策略（earnings_event_long）的坏信号。通过在 backtester.py 中添加 llm_attribution.by_strategy 策略分层，可以分别统计每个策略的 LLM 否决率。如果 LLM 对 C 策略的否决率高于 A/B 策略，则 LLM 有策略识别能力，正在主动保护系统。
change_summary: 在 backtester.py 中添加 per-strategy LLM veto 统计。_pre_gate 快照 + _after_tickers 对比计算每个策略的 presented/vetoed/passed/veto_rate。llm_attribution dict 新增 by_strategy 字段。新增 2 个测试（by_strategy 计数正确性 + 空目录返回空 dict）。

llm_attribution.by_strategy.new: dict per strategy: {presented, vetoed, passed, veto_rate}

delta_metrics.note: 关键发现：LLM 对 earnings_event_long 的否决率（83.3%）显著高于 breakout_long（50%）。5天样本太小无法结论性判断，但方向正确——LLM 确实在过滤 C 策略信号。6个月全窗口 --replay-llm 显示 1/124 天覆盖（仅 Apr 13 有信号到达 LLM gate，其余 Apr 14-17 因持仓满额未产生新信号），EV 从 0.2595 → 0.2763（+6.5%）。

next_retry_requires: 需要积累更多 LLM 数据（当前 5 天，目标 30 天）以得出统计显著的结论
P-ERN: 等待 earnings_snapshot 数据积累，验证 positive_surprise_history 是否改善 C 策略胜率
当 LLM 覆盖率 >= 30 天后，运行 --replay-llm 并对比 by_strategy veto_rate 是否稳定
notes: 231/231 tests pass. by_strategy 分层功能已实现并测试。AGENTS.md §一 门槛已为 5 天：该实验满足 5 天覆盖要求，完成了首次 P-LLM 归因运行。下一步：继续积累 LLM 和 earnings 快照数据。

hypothesis: ATR_TARGET_MULT=3.5 may be premature. All 18 target-hit trades were 100% wins (avg +7.76% each). If winners naturally run past 3.5x ATR, raising the multiplier captures more upside. If price barely reaches target, raising it converts winners to EOB/stops and loses money.
change_summary: Added atr_target_mult parameter to enrich_signal_with_risk() and enrich_signals() in risk_engine.py. Added ATR_TARGET_MULT to DEFAULT_CONFIG in backtester.py and wired it through. Swept ATR_TARGET_MULT=[3.0, 3.5, 4.0, 4.5, 5.0] across 3 non-overlapping 6-month windows (same entry/stop/C-strategy baseline). ATR_TARGET_MULT=4.0 best in primary window but degrades in secondary+tertiary.

delta_metrics.note: W1 (primary) ATR_TARGET_MULT=4.0 best: +28.8% PnL (+$4206 vs baseline 3.5), +18.6% Sharpe (2.17 vs 1.83). However: W2 best is 3.0 (+13.5% vs 3.5), W3 all unprofitable (4.0 least-bad). No single multiplier improves in >=2/3 windows per Gate 4.

rejection_reason: AGENTS.md Gate 4 multi-window stability: ATR_TARGET_MULT=4.0 (best in W1) regresses W2 and leaves W3 unprofitable. No multiplier improves EV >10% in >=2/3 windows. Interpretation: 3.5x target is well-calibrated to primary BULL regime; exit alpha leak is NOT in target width. Likely source: regime-dependent exit (different target mult per BULL/NEUTRAL/BEAR).
next_retry_requires: Regime-aware exit (A6): test different target multipliers conditional on market_regime
Higher-quality BEAR-regime window data (W3 Oct24-Apr25 had structural losses across all multipliers)
Percent-based trails if returning to trailing stops (exp-002 ATR-multiple trails failed)
notes: Parametrization code remains in codebase; infrastructure is sound. Rejection is on alpha direction, not implementation quality. Exp-002 trailing-stop rejection also listed target-width concerns in next_retry_requires; this experiment confirms current target is not the alpha source.
